Seed the dried chilis
In a dry saute pan, toast all the chilis.  Grind to powder in a robot coupe
In a large rondeaux or stock pot, add all ingredients and slowly simmer for ~35 mins
Let cool to room temperature then strain through descending sized seivs (china cap > chinois > cheese cloth)
Store in appropriate sized containers in the cooler.
